narrative:
Batavia Township M (precinct in Clermont County) has 1,154 registered voters, with 53.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.1 percentage points.
